# Agra Tour Guides

> Government-licensed Agra-based travel agency offering private Taj Mahal tours, Agra Fort tours, and Golden Triangle (Delhi-Agra-Jaipur) itineraries. 5.0★ Google rating from 81+ verified travellers across 30+ countries. English, Hindi & Japanese-speaking guides; partner-coordinated French, Spanish, German, Italian, Russian, Arabic, Mandarin and Korean.

Pricing tiers (transparent, USD/EUR/INR):
- Guide-Only Taj Mahal tour: from ₹1,800 ($22 / €20) for group up to 5, 1.5–2 hours
- Guide + AC Cab same-day from Delhi: from $89 / €82 per person, group of 2
- Golden Triangle 3-day all-inclusive: from $299 / €274 per person, double occupancy
- Custom multi-week itineraries (Rajasthan, Varanasi, Khajuraho, Himalayas): bespoke quote

## Key pages

- [Home](https://agratourguides.com/): Service overview, top tours, real reviews, booking CTA
- [Services & pricing](https://agratourguides.com/services/): All four service tiers with included/excluded details, nine add-on modules, transparent USD/EUR pricing
- [Reviews](https://agratourguides.com/reviews/): All verified Google reviews with reviewer names, countries, dates, and per-Review schema
- [FAQ](https://agratourguides.com/faq/): 20+ questions foreign travellers actually ask — pricing, timing, scams, payment methods, dress code
- [About](https://agratourguides.com/about/): Agency origin, team, government licensing, languages
- [Contact](https://agratourguides.com/contact/): WhatsApp deep-link booking form

## Tours

- [Same-day Agra from Delhi](https://agratourguides.com/tours/same-day-agra-from-delhi/): 460 km round trip, Yamuna Expressway, Taj Mahal + Agra Fort
- [Agra overnight from Delhi](https://agratourguides.com/tours/agra-overnight-from-delhi/): 2 days, sunrise Taj, includes Fatehpur Sikri
- [Golden Triangle 3 days](https://agratourguides.com/tours/golden-triangle-3-days/): Delhi → Agra → Jaipur, fast-paced
- [Golden Triangle 5 days](https://agratourguides.com/tours/golden-triangle-5-days/): Comfortable pace, the most-booked package
- [Delhi day tour](https://agratourguides.com/tours/delhi-day-tour/): Old + New Delhi monuments, food, bazaars
- [Jaipur day tour](https://agratourguides.com/tours/jaipur-day-tour/): Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar

## Cities & attractions

- [Agra](https://agratourguides.com/agra/): Taj Mahal, Agra Fort, Fatehpur Sikri, Mehtab Bagh
- [Delhi](https://agratourguides.com/delhi/): Red Fort, Qutub Minar, Humayun's Tomb, India Gate
- [Jaipur](https://agratourguides.com/jaipur/): Amber Fort, Hawa Mahal, City Palace, Jantar Mantar

- [Best time to visit the Taj Mahal](https://agratourguides.com/guides/best-time-to-visit-taj-mahal/)
- [Delhi to Agra: how to reach](https://agratourguides.com/guides/delhi-to-agra-how-to-reach/)
- [Golden Triangle itinerary planning](https://agratourguides.com/guides/golden-triangle-itinerary-planning/)

## Trust signals

- Google Business profile: 5.0★ / 81+ reviews
- Government of India Ministry of Tourism licensed guides
- Archaeological Survey of India (ASI) badges (required to enter Taj Mahal complex)
- Foreigner-first transparent pricing in USD, EUR, INR — no commission, no shop kickbacks
- WhatsApp support 06:00–22:00 IST
